title: CRAC unit crac-c1 compressor fault — rack-c thermal event
root_cause: CRAC unit crac-c1 failed at 08:41 UTC due to compressor pressure fault. Airflow to rack-c dropped from 1200 CFM to 0 CFM. Ambient temperature in rack-c rose from 22 °C to 35.8 °C within 14 minutes.
impact: All 4 nodes in rack-c entered CPU thermal-throttle mode at 40% frequency reduction (3200 MHz → 1920 MHz). 12 running jobs are experiencing degraded throughput. Estimated compute capacity loss: 40% of rack-c (4 nodes × 64 cores).
mitigations_applied: Thermal throttle engaged automatically on node-c01 through node-c04
Portable cooling unit procurement in progress
recommended_action: Drain jobs from node-c01 through node-c04 and drain rack-c. Dispatch facilities engineer to replace or repair crac-c1. ETA for portable cooling unit: 2 hours.

timeline.event: Monitoring alert: rack-c ambient > 28 °C — INC-2026-042 opened
node-c01 through node-c04 enter thermal throttle
